title: We want to hire a Monday.com Expert
excerpt:
We are an Israeli company with around 40 employees and we have now used Monday as our primary project management tool for the last two years. 
We also manage our Business lids, Recruitment process and etc., on Monaday.co…

posts.author: LiorSt (Lior Stein)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are an Israeli company with around 40 employees and we have now used Monday as our primary project management tool for the last two years.
We also manage our Business lids, Recruitment process and etc., on Monaday.com.
Most of what we do today we do manually; we would like to ramp it up and be professionals for real

We want to hire an expert that can help us with automation and to set up our workflow so that everything works smoothly and more effectively.

Anyone?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@LiorSt

I noticed that you had not gotten any responses. I moved your post to the “Hire an Expert” category.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: The ITEM ID column - What most people don’t know.
Contact me directly here: Contact – The Monday Man

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LiorSt

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements. We also have extensive experience with project management workflows and solutions.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LiorSt !

Welcome to Monday.com’s Community! We are so glad to have you here and would love the opportunity to help you and your team with you business lids, recruitment process, and etc… My company, Lucid Day, focuses in creating a collaborative workspace that will make the most of your monday.com account, while also teaching you the in’s and out’s of the system and how it works.

You can check out more about our services at monday.com Professional Services - Lucid Day and even book a FREE consultation with my colleague here.

Hope you have a great day!

Jai-Lynn Hoops, Lucid Day - Service Delivery Support Manager

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LiorSt
Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone.
My name is Kaya with Kick Consulting. We are a Silver Partner with monday.com and have a global team of 14 (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers) who have a tremendous amount of monday.com knowledge. We would love to help you set up and optimise your monday!

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pain points, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book through this link. If you cannot find a suitable time, please let me know, and I will contact you with more availability.

Kaya
Kick Consulting

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nettpakke

Welcome to the monday community!

By developing customized workflows in monday .com using an appropriate template, your team can automate repetitive tasks and enhance productivity. Besides, integrating your monday com account with other enterprise apps enables automated workflows between desired data sources while keeping conditions of logic, routing, and data formatting as is.

You can hire monday.com experts from the monday com preferred consulting partner company. Through seamless integrations and custom workflow deployment, experts can help your team experience new ways of working through modernized workflows.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
